scop 0.8.9

ESTIMATE score plots

EstimateScorePlot.Rd

Visualize ESTIMATE stromal, immune, combined ESTIMATE, and tumor-purity scores from a RunESTIMATE() result.

Usage

EstimateScorePlot(
  object = NULL,
  score.data = NULL,
  group.by = NULL,
  group.data = NULL,
  plot_type = c("violin", "box", "heatmap", "cor"),
  scores = c("StromalScore", "ImmuneScore", "ESTIMATEScore", "TumorPurity"),
  add_stat = TRUE,
  ...
)

Arguments

object

Optional RunESTIMATE() bundle, SummarizedExperiment, or Seurat object containing ESTIMATE results.

score.data

Optional score matrix or data frame with samples in rows.

group.by

Optional grouping column for grouped violin and box plots.

group.data

Optional named vector or data frame containing sample groups.

plot_type

Plot type.

scores

ESTIMATE score columns to plot.

add_stat

Whether to add group comparison labels to violin or box plots.

...

Additional plotting arguments.

Value

A ggplot object.

On this page
